BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"3. I feel my future is hopeless and will only get worse.","Q2":"1. I have failed more than I should have.","Q3":"0. I get as much pleasure as I ever did from the things I enjoy.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"2. I expect to be punished.","Q6":"1. I have lost confidence in myself.","Q7":"2. I criticize myself for all my faults.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"3. I feel like crying, but I can't.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"0. I have not lost interest in other people or activities.","Q12":"1. I find it more difficult to make decisions than usual.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"1. I don't consider myself as worthwhile and useful as I used to.","Q15":"2. I don't have enough energy to do very much.","Q16":"1+. I sleep somewhat more than usual.","Q17":"2. I am much more irritable than usual.","Q18":"1-. My appetite is somewhat less than usual.","Q19":"0. I can concentrate as well as ever.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"0. I have not noticed any recent changes in my interest in sex."}
